# Transform vector to (a,b)

Transform vector to (a,b)

## Usage

``` r
transform_alpha(x, a = 0, b = 1)
```

## Arguments

- x:

  vector to transform

- a:

  lower bound of transform

- b:

  upper bound of transform

## Value

transformed vector

## Examples

``` r
transform_alpha(runif(100))
#>   [1] 0.91740068 0.56584751 0.74056449 0.67448740 0.35716962 0.04443018
#>   [7] 0.46430360 0.68111531 0.75669823 0.34481863 0.63715634 0.19902907
```
